name: last30days-crypto
description: Crypto research from the last 30 days. X-first social search plus CoinGecko, Messari, and LunarCrush for market, on-chain, and social-quant data.

settings.name: Extension Directory
settings.description: Extension installation directory (auto-set by Gemini CLI)

settings.name: Twitter AUTH_TOKEN
settings.description: Twitter browser AUTH_TOKEN cookie for X search (required)

settings.name: Twitter CT0
settings.description: Twitter browser CT0 cookie (required, pair with AUTH_TOKEN)

settings.name: xAI API Key
settings.description: xAI API Key for X/Twitter grounded search (recommended)

settings.name: CoinGecko API Key
settings.description: CoinGecko Pro key for token resolution and price/market data (recommended)

settings.name: Messari API Key
settings.description: Messari API key for asset profiles, derivatives, volatility (recommended)

settings.name: LunarCrush API Key
settings.description: LunarCrush API key for social-quant signals, sentiment, top creators (recommended)

settings.name: Firecrawl API Key
settings.description: Firecrawl API key for planner-driven URL scraping fallback (optional)

settings.name: Exa API Key
settings.description: Exa search key for web grounding (optional)

settings.name: Perplexity API Key
settings.description: Perplexity API key for additional research grounding (optional)
